invitation.subject: Welcome to Forethread — Activate Your Account
invitation.heading: You have been invited to join the Forethread procurement platform.
invitation.body: Click the button below to activate your account and set your password:
invitation.ignore: If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

otp.subject: Your Forethread Login Code
otp.heading: We received a request to log in to your account.
otp.ignore: If you did not attempt to log in, please contact your administrator immediately.

passwordReset.subject: Forethread — Password Reset Request
passwordReset.heading: We received a request to reset the password for your account.
passwordReset.body: To proceed, please click the secure button below:
passwordReset.expiry: This link is valid for 15 minutes and can be used only once.
passwordReset.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email — your account will remain secure.
passwordReset.security: For your security, do not share this link with anyone.

deactivation.subject: Forethread — Your Account Has Been Deactivated
deactivation.heading: Your Forethread account has been deactivated by an administrator.
deactivation.body: If you believe this is an error, please contact your company administrator.

reactivation.subject: Forethread — Your Account Has Been Reactivated
reactivation.heading: Your Forethread account has been reactivated by an administrator.
reactivation.body: You can now log in to the platform using your existing credentials. If you have forgotten your password, please use the forgot password link on the login page.

vendorInvitation.subject: Forethread — You've Been Invited to Join as a Vendor
vendorInvitation.heading: A contractor has invited your company to join the Forethread procurement platform.
vendorInvitation.body: Click the button below to activate your account and set your password:
vendorInvitation.ignore: If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

vendorCompanyInvitation.subject: Forethread — Your Company Has Been Invited
vendorCompanyInvitation.heading: Your company has been invited to join the Forethread procurement platform by a contractor.
vendorCompanyInvitation.body: A representative from your company has been sent an activation link. If you need to set up additional users, please contact the account administrator once your company account is active.
vendorCompanyInvitation.ignore: If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

rfqReceived.subject: Forethread — New RFQ Received ({{rfqNumber}})
rfqReceived.heading: You have received a new Request for Quotation.
rfqReceived.body: A contractor has sent your company an RFQ ({{rfqNumber}}). Please review the details and submit your quote before the deadline.
rfqReceived.expiry: You can respond even if your account has not been activated yet.

poIssued.subject: Forethread — New Purchase Order Received ({{poNumber}})
poIssued.heading: You have received a new Purchase Order.
poIssued.body: A contractor has issued a purchase order ({{poNumber}}) to your company. Please review and acknowledge the order.
poIssued.note: A PDF copy of the purchase order is attached to this email.

changeRequestProposed.subject: Forethread — Change Request for Bulk Order {{bulkId}}
changeRequestProposed.heading: A change request has been submitted for bulk order {{bulkId}}.
changeRequestProposed.body: {{proposedBy}} has proposed changes to the bulk agreement. Please review the proposed changes and approve or reject them.

changeRequestApproved.subject: Forethread — Change Request Approved ({{bulkId}})
changeRequestApproved.heading: Your change request for bulk order {{bulkId}} has been approved.
changeRequestApproved.body: The proposed changes have been applied and the agreement has been updated to a new version. Both parties now operate under the updated terms.

changeRequestRejected.subject: Forethread — Change Request Rejected ({{bulkId}})
changeRequestRejected.heading: Your change request for bulk order {{bulkId}} has been rejected.
changeRequestRejected.body: The other party has rejected the proposed changes. The current version of the agreement remains active.

bulkOrderCancelled.subject: Forethread — Bulk Order Cancelled ({{bulkId}})
bulkOrderCancelled.heading: Bulk order {{bulkId}} has been cancelled.
bulkOrderCancelled.body: {{cancelledBy}} has cancelled the bulk agreement. No further drawdowns can be made against this agreement.

quoteUpdated.subject: Forethread — Quote Updated for RFQ {{rfqNumber}}
quoteUpdated.heading: A vendor has updated their quote response.
quoteUpdated.body: {{vendorName}} has made changes to their quote for RFQ {{rfqNumber}}. Please review the updated response.

quoteSubmitted.subject: Forethread — New Quote for RFQ {{rfqNumber}}
quoteSubmitted.heading: A new quote has been submitted.
quoteSubmitted.body: {{vendorName}} has submitted a quote response for RFQ {{rfqNumber}}. Please review their offer.

poDeclinedByVendor.subject: Forethread — Purchase Order Declined ({{poNumber}})
poDeclinedByVendor.heading: A vendor has declined purchase order {{poNumber}}.
poDeclinedByVendor.body: {{vendorName}} has declined the purchase order. Please review and take appropriate action.

invitationExpiredNotification.subject: Forethread — Invitation Link Expired for {{invitedUserName}}
invitationExpiredNotification.heading: A user you invited tried to activate their account, but the invitation link has expired.
invitationExpiredNotification.body: {{invitedUserName}} ({{invitedUserEmail}}) attempted to use their invitation link, which is no longer valid. Please resend the invitation from the user management panel.
invitationExpiredNotification.action: You can resend the invitation by navigating to the Users page and selecting "Reset Invitation" for this user.
